title: Simple Keystrokes
description: Fully customizable Keystroke Mod. Use /keystrokes to open the Editor.
body:
Fully customizable Keystroke Mod. 
Use /keystrokes to open the Editor.
You can customize the Keystrokes in the Editor.
You can change the Color how you want it, and even turn on CPS & RGB
There are WASD Keystrokes and under it for the Mouseclicks.
You can change the position of the Keystrokes in the Editor, by dragging the Keystrokes around.

This Mod is **DISCONTINUED**
